description: Evaluates log management maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, logging systems, identity and technology log collection, anomaly detection, scope, records, protection, and analyst hierarchy.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A log management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise log management service exists
Frequent log management service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Log management KPIs and KRIs are formalized, documented, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for log management
Frequent KPI/KRI review

capabilities.name: Log management system
capabilities.description: A logging system manages and correlates logs enterprise-wide with automation, configuration review, and integrations.
evaluation_focus: Logging system to manage and correlate all logs
Raw log consumption from all enterprise segments
Automation to process large volumes of logs
Frequent logging system configuration review
Integration with compliance, vulnerability, and asset management

capabilities.name: Identity logs
capabilities.description: All identity technology sends identity and access logs automatically to centralized logging.
evaluation_focus: Automatic centralized identity and access logging

capabilities.name: Anomaly detection
capabilities.description: The logging solution monitors and identifies anomalies with configurable automated responses.
evaluation_focus: Anomaly monitoring and identification capability
Configurable automated anomaly responses

capabilities.name: Endpoint device logging
capabilities.description: All endpoint device technology sends device and access logs automatically to centralized logging.
evaluation_focus: Automatic centralized endpoint device and access logging

capabilities.name: Network logging
capabilities.description: All network technology sends network and access logs automatically to centralized logging.
evaluation_focus: Automatic centralized network and access logging

capabilities.name: Application Security logging
capabilities.description: All application technology sends application and access logs automatically to centralized logging.
evaluation_focus: Automatic centralized application and access logging

capabilities.name: Data access monitoring
capabilities.description: All data asset technology sends data and access logs automatically to centralized logging.
evaluation_focus: Automatic centralized data and access logging

capabilities.name: Logging Scope
capabilities.description: A clear logging scope is defined and reevaluated frequently to maintain efficacy and storage stability.
evaluation_focus: Clear defined logging scope for devices and technology
Frequent scope reevaluation for efficacy and storage stability

capabilities.name: Log Records
capabilities.description: The logging solution produces audit logs for all technology that sends logs to it.
evaluation_focus: Audit logs for all log-producing technology

capabilities.name: Log Protection
capabilities.description: The log management system stores logs securely and prevents unauthorized changes.
evaluation_focus: Secure log storage and prevention of unauthorized log changes

capabilities.name: Log management team
capabilities.description: A clear hierarchy of T1, T2, and T3 analysts processes logs.
evaluation_focus: T1, T2, and T3 analyst hierarchy for log processing

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
